---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new skill idea
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to see?**
A clear description of the feature or new skill.

**Which skill would this affect, or is it a new skill?**

**Why would this be useful?**
What problem does it solve?

**Any implementation ideas?**
Optional — how you'd imagine it working.
